hero.headline:
The right pro,
found in seconds.
hero.subheadline: Need a haircut, tutor, photographer, or handyman? Stop texting everyone you know. ScheduleMe finds vetted, reviewed local pros — or students at your own school — instantly.
hero.trust_line: Used by students and homeowners across 12 cities

features.title: No more phone tag
features.description: Describe what you need and get matched instantly. No calls, no waiting, no "I'll get back to you."

features.title: Actually vetted pros
features.description: Every professional is reviewed by real customers. No random Craigslist strangers — just verified locals with track records.

features.title: Built for campus life
features.description: Verified campus marketplace for students. Find photographers, barbers, tutors, and more — from people at your own school.

features.title: No hidden fees
features.description: Free to use as a customer. We only charge businesses 12% when a job is completed — so pros are motivated to show up.

demo_steps.title: Describe it like you'd text a friend
demo_steps.description: "My kitchen pipe has been dripping for a week and I have no idea who to call." That's all you need.

demo_steps.title: AI matches you in seconds
demo_steps.description: We figure out what you need, how urgent it is, and which local pros are actually available — no guessing on your end.

demo_steps.title: Book, message, done
demo_steps.description: Pick your pro, book directly, and message them from the app. No phone calls unless you want them.
